name: Sesame Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1 In a shallow dish, mix together flour, 3/4 tsp garlic salt, onion salt, lemon-pepper seasoning, and paprika.
2 In another shallow dish, mix together butter, cooking oil, remaining garlic salt, and pepper.
3 In a third dish, place sesame seeds.
4 Roll each piece of chicken first in the flour mixture, then in the butter mixture, and finally in the sesame seeds.
5 Place the chicken on a greased shallow baking pan.
6 Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 1 hour, turning once, until a fork can be easily inserted into the chicken.
